no-restricted-globals.name: SharedArrayBuffer
no-restricted-globals.message: SharedArrayBuffer is blocked in MW (COOP/COEP headers not set by ResourceLoader). Use plain ArrayBuffer.

no-restricted-globals.name: require
no-restricted-globals.message: 'require' is not a global in MW. Use mw.loader.using() for async dependency loading.

eslint-js/no-restricted-syntax.message: Nullish coalescing (??) is rejected by the MW linter. Use a ternary or || instead.
Nullish assignment (??=) is rejected by the MW linter Use an explicit if-check instead.
Optional chaining (?.) is rejected by the MW linter. Use explicit && guards instead.
Private class fields (#x) are rejected by the MW linter. Use a constructor-assigned property or WeakMap for clarity.
Private class methods (#m) are rejected by the MW linter. Use a module-scoped function or WeakMap pattern.
There is no module graph in MW, so import.meta is not available. Use mw.loader.using() instead.
Dynamic import() has no module graph in MW. Use mw.loader.using() instead.
